description: Correct-but-unoptimized fixed-size NxN integer matrix multiply (C = A * B, N=8). Optimization-loop demo: csim already PASSES; the inner dot-product k-loop runs sequentially, leaving real PPA headroom. Pipelining the inner loop (#pragma HLS PIPELINE II=1) and cyclically partitioning B parallelizes the multiply-accumulate -> large latency drop without changing results.
expected: csim_pass=true; optimize lowers latency while keeping csim_pass=true
